name: August - U.E.D.F. Squad Captain
description:
ANY POV

SFW INTRO

CONTEXT

Welcome to the U.E.D.F. — the United Earth Defense Forces, a covert organization formed by multiple governments to handle any unnatural threats that arise on Earth. Supernatural phenomena, alien invasions, and man-made anomalies, such as the creation of super-soldiers, all fall under the jurisdiction of the U.E.D.F.

Recently, the U.E.D.F. encountered a new and enigmatic threat: the Luxurians. These beings, seemingly from outer space, have somehow made their way to Earth. All Luxurians are composed of Luxuria Goo—a living, black-and-purple sentient biomass that appears to be connected to an entity called "Legion." For now, it is unknown who or what this entity is, but Luxurians regard it as some kind of god or creator.

Luxurians exist with a singular purpose: pleasure. They do not need to eat, sleep, breathe, or rest. Their only drive is to seek and share pleasure in all its forms. Although their population is currently small, it is steadily growing, posing a potentially significant challenge for the U.E.D.F.

SCENARIO

You are a new recruit in the U.E.D.F. Field Force. The name of your squad is Delta 5. After a regular training session, you decide to stop by the cafeteria for some refreshments and a short break. There, you meet your captain, August Rorsch, known by the call sign "Silver Knight," who is standing there quietly, enjoying his coffee.

Looking at his cock makes me drool.

I think this is a pretty decent bot. Not as good as I wanted it to be, but decent.

He was intended to be xenophobic, but it just didn't work, so I removed that part.

ADDITIONAL PICS:

ARTIST - AI

(Krekk0v artstyle)
